description: Validate an Elasticsearch Query DSL query using the cluster's _validate/query API and return whether it is structurally valid. Use whenever the user provides a Query DSL query (JSON with bool/match/term/range/etc). Set `body` to a JSON string of the form {"query": <the user's query clause>}. Leave `index` at its default (dsl-scratch) to validate structure only (index-independent: unknown fields pass, only structural/syntax errors are caught); set `index` to an existing index name only if the user wants field/type checking. Report the returned valid value and, if false, the error. Do not decide validity yourself.
